allow: Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);const f=\(j.tool_input||{}\).file_path||'';const path=require\('path'\);const b=path.basename\(f\);const dir=path.dirname\(f\);if\(b==='CLAUDE.md'\)console.log\('Would cp to: '+path.join\(dir,'GEMINI.md'\)\);else if\(b==='GEMINI.md'\)console.log\('Would cp to: '+path.join\(dir,'CLAUDE.md'\)\);else console.log\('no match: '+b\);}\)")
